# Sarkonix — Global Digital Growth Agency

> Elite digital experiences for brands that demand perfection. We don't just build websites; we engineer growth engines.

[Full Website Markdown Mirror](/llms-full.txt)

## About Us
Sarkonix crafts elite digital experiences — from high-performance websites to scaled growth systems. Built for global authority.
We are a registered Micro, Small, and Medium Enterprise (MSME), signifying our commitment to operational integrity, financial stability, and world-class digital delivery.

## Core Services
- **Web Intelligence**: Data-driven SEO and marketing strategies that dominate market share and drive ROI.
- **Web App Development**: High-performance web apps with world-class codebases engineered in Bengaluru.
- **AI Solutions**: Custom LLM integration and intelligent automation systems to optimize your business workflow.
- **SEO Strategy**: Data-driven strategies that dominate market share and drive massive organic traffic.
- **Mobile Apps**: Native experiences that deliver seamless performance on iOS and Android.
- **E-Commerce**: High-converting online stores with seamless payment and inventory integrations.

## Performance Metrics
- **Avg. ROI**: +240%
- **Latency**: 98ms
- **Uptime**: 100%
